title: ericoides hirtum
intro: Ericoides hirtum, also known as Indian dill or hairy ericoides, is a plant species belonging to the family Apocynaceae, characterized by its hairy stem and leaves. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Ericoides hirtum include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. Ericoides hirtum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, making it a versatile remedy in traditional Ayurvedic medicine.
